summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ShowMeLive Admin Panel. All admin features working correctly - login, dashboard overview, user management, event management, ticket management, and logout functionality.
passed_tests: Admin login with valid credentials (admin@showmelive.com / admin123)
Admin login rejection with invalid credentials
Admin dashboard Overview tab - displays user stats, event stats, ticket stats, revenue
Admin dashboard Users tab - lists all users with block/unblock actions
Admin dashboard Events tab - lists all events with status and block capability
Admin dashboard Tickets tab - lists all tickets with refund capability
Admin dashboard Live tab - live event monitoring
Admin dashboard Bank tab - platform bank account info
Admin logout - clears session and redirects to /admin/login
All admin API endpoints authenticated and working (13/13 tests passed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel fully tested and working. Admin login uses email/password authentication with localStorage token. All tabs (Overview, Users, Events, Tickets, Live, Bank) functional. Block/unblock user and event actions available. Refund capability on tickets tab.
